ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries */,
  "tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  "critical" INTEGER /* Number of critical cases */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinations */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths */,
  "new_recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of new recoveries */,
  "new_tests" INTEGER /* Number of new tests */,
  "new_critical_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new critical cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  "last_verified" TEXT /* Date and time of the last verification of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the update */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads */,
  "last_viewed" TEXT /* Date and time of the last view */,
  "last_downloaded" TEXT /* Date and time of the last download */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)
